services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Personalised treatments to reveal your natural beauty
services.overview_subtitle: Discover our full range of medical and aesthetic protocols, designed to reveal your natural beauty with precision and care.

laser.name: Laser Hair Removal
laser.description: Permanent removal of unwanted hair using the latest laser technology. Treatments for all body and facial areas.
laser.process: Consultation → Skin test → Sessions (6–8 spaced 4–6 weeks apart) → Permanent results
laser.page_subtitle: Smooth, lasting skin with the latest laser technologies
laser.step1_desc: Assessment of your skin type, complexion and areas to be treated with Dr. Meryem.
laser.step2_desc: Laser application on a small test area to validate your skin's response before treatment.
laser.step3_desc: 6 to 8 sessions spaced 4 to 6 weeks apart for an optimal and lasting result.
laser.step4_desc: Lastingly smooth skin. Annual maintenance may be sufficient depending on the areas treated.
laser.forWho: Ideal for anyone wishing to be free from the constraints of shaving or waxing. Our technologies are suitable for all skin types, from the lightest to the darkest. Suitable for both women and men for all body and facial areas.
laser.faq1_a: Generally, 6 to 8 sessions are needed to achieve significant permanent reduction. The exact number varies depending on the area treated, your skin type and hair cycle.
laser.faq2_a: Our latest generation equipment includes integrated cooling systems. The sensation is comparable to a slight tingling, generally very well tolerated.
laser.faq3_a: All areas of the body and face: underarms, bikini line, legs, arms, back, face, upper lip, and many more.
laser.faq4_q: Is any preparation required before the session?
laser.faq4_a: It is recommended to shave the area to be treated 24 hours before the session. Avoid sun exposure and self-tanners 2 weeks before treatment.

face.name: Facial Treatment
face.description: Bespoke protocols to hydrate, brighten and rejuvenate your skin. Suitable for all skin types.
face.process: Skin diagnosis → Personalised treatment → Mask → Post-treatment care
face.page_subtitle: Bespoke protocols to reveal your skin's natural radiance
face.step1_desc: Precise analysis of your skin type, specific needs and current beauty routine.
face.step2_desc: Application of the most suitable active ingredients for your skin: moisturisers, antioxidants, gentle acids or rebalancing agents.
face.step3_desc: Nourishing, purifying or plumping mask according to the needs identified during the diagnosis.
face.step4_desc: Personalised recommendations to extend the benefits of the treatment at home.
face.forWho: This treatment is suitable for all skin types, regardless of age. Whether you want to combat dehydration, early signs of ageing, blemishes or a dull complexion, a personalised protocol is available for you.
face.faq1_a: A monthly session is recommended to maintain optimal radiance and support the skin's natural cell renewal.
face.faq2_q: Is my treatment suitable for sensitive skin?
face.faq2_a: Absolutely. We only select active ingredients well tolerated by sensitive skin. The initial diagnosis identifies your sensitivities.
face.faq3_q: What results can I expect from the first session?
face.faq3_a: Visible radiance, a feeling of hydrated and smoothed skin, and an even complexion are observable from the moment you leave the cabin.
face.faq4_q: Should I avoid make-up after the treatment?
face.faq4_a: It is advisable to avoid make-up for 4 to 6 hours after the treatment to allow the active ingredients to work fully.

peeling.name: Chemical Peel
peeling.description: Controlled chemical exfoliation to erase imperfections, dark spots and texture irregularities.
peeling.process: Consultation → Acid application → Neutralisation → Post-peel care
peeling.page_subtitle: Medical exfoliation for luminous, refined skin
peeling.step1_desc: Assessment of your skin, your expectations and selection of the most suitable type and concentration of acid.
peeling.step2_desc: Careful and precise application of the exfoliating agent to targeted areas by the practitioner.
peeling.step3_desc: Stopping the chemical action and applying soothing treatments to calm the skin immediately.
peeling.step4_desc: Intensive hydration, sun protection and advice to support optimal skin regeneration.
peeling.forWho: Chemical peel is indicated for skin with pigmentation spots, mild acne scars, irregular texture or a dull complexion. Suitable for adults seeking effective and visible skin renewal.
peeling.faq1_a: You will feel a slight tingling or warm sensation during application. This is temporary and generally well tolerated by the majority of patients.
peeling.faq2_a: Depending on the depth of the peel, slight flaking may occur for 3 to 7 days. No time off work is necessary for superficial peels.
peeling.faq3_q: Can I sun bathe after a peel?
peeling.faq3_a: Sun exposure must be avoided for 2 to 4 weeks after treatment and SPF 50+ sunscreen applied daily.
peeling.faq4_a: 1 to 3 sessions depending on the problem being treated, spaced 4 weeks apart. Results improve progressively after each session.

meso.name: Mesotherapy & PRP
meso.description: Injection of vitamin cocktails or platelet-rich plasma to deeply regenerate the skin.
meso.process: Collection/Preparation → Microneedling or injections → Soothing care
meso.page_subtitle: Deep cellular regeneration for revitalised, luminous skin
meso.step1_desc: For PRP, a blood sample is taken and centrifuged to extract the platelet-enriched plasma.
meso.step2_desc: Application of the vitamin cocktail or PRP by microneedling or targeted fine intradermal injections.
meso.step3_desc: Application of calming and regenerating products to maximise effects and reduce post-session discomfort.
meso.step4_desc: Results improve progressively over 4 to 6 weeks. A protocol of 3 to 4 sessions is recommended.
meso.forWho: Ideal for tired, dull skin or skin showing early signs of ageing. Suitable for those seeking a natural regenerating treatment using the body's own resources (PRP) or targeted medical active ingredients (mesotherapy).
meso.faq1_q: What is the difference between mesotherapy and PRP?
meso.faq1_a: Mesotherapy injects cocktails of vitamins and targeted active ingredients, while PRP uses your own blood plasma enriched with platelets. Both stimulate cell regeneration, but through distinct mechanisms.
meso.faq2_a: Slight redness or swelling may persist for 24 to 48 hours after the session. This generally does not require social avoidance.
meso.faq3_a: A protocol of 3 to 4 sessions spaced 3 to 4 weeks apart is recommended for optimal results, followed by a maintenance session every 3 to 6 months.
meso.faq4_a: An anaesthetic cream can be applied before the session for optimal comfort. The injections are fine and generally very well tolerated.

cellulite.name: Cellulite Treatment
cellulite.description: Targeted body protocols to reduce the orange-peel effect and firm treated areas.
cellulite.page_subtitle: Targeted body protocols for a redefined, firm silhouette
cellulite.step1_desc: Assessment of the type of cellulite, areas to be treated and definition of the most appropriate protocol for your body.
cellulite.step2_desc: Combination of complementary technologies (radiofrequency, drainage, ultrasound) for maximum effectiveness.
cellulite.step3_desc: Programme of 6 to 10 sessions to observe progressive and lasting results in the targeted areas.
cellulite.step4_desc: Regular assessment of results and adjustment of the protocol if necessary. No recovery required.
cellulite.forWho: This treatment is suitable for women and men with localised or diffuse cellulite, particularly in the thighs, abdomen, arms or buttocks. It is suitable for all body types and can be combined with a healthy lifestyle.
cellulite.faq1_q: How many sessions to see results?
cellulite.faq1_a: First results are often visible from the 3rd or 4th session. A complete programme of 6 to 10 sessions is recommended for optimal and lasting results.
cellulite.faq2_a: The treatments are non-invasive and comfortable. You may feel slight heat or pressure depending on the technology used, but no pain.
cellulite.faq3_a: Results can last several months. Half-yearly maintenance is recommended, as well as a good lifestyle to maintain the effects obtained.
cellulite.faq4_q: Can I combine this treatment with other treatments?
cellulite.faq4_a: Yes, cellulite treatment can be effectively combined with other body treatments offered at the clinic for even more complete results.

body.name: Body Treatment
body.description: Enveloping treatments and wellness rituals to nourish, firm and illuminate the skin.
body.page_subtitle: Wellness rituals and enveloping treatments to enhance your body skin
body.step1_desc: Removal of dead cells and skin preparation to optimise absorption of subsequent treatments.
body.step2_desc: Application of an enveloping mask (clay, algae, mud or nourishing active ingredients) according to your specific needs.
body.step3_desc: Relaxing or draining massage to stimulate circulation and promote absorption of active ingredients.
body.step4_desc: Application of a rich, nourishing body treatment to seal in the benefits of the treatment.
body.forWho: This treatment is accessible to everyone, regardless of skin type. It is particularly suitable for dry, tired skin or after a period of stress. Ideal as a course or à la carte for a regular wellness break.
body.faq1_q: How long does a session last?
body.faq1_a: A body treatment session generally lasts between 60 and 90 minutes, depending on the protocol chosen and the treatments included.
body.faq2_q: Can I choose the type of wrap?
body.faq2_a: Yes, we offer different types of wraps adapted to your preferences and needs: purifying clay, remineralising algae or nourishing active ingredients.
body.faq3_a: This treatment is very well tolerated. Please inform the practitioner in case of known allergy, pregnancy or particular skin pathology.
body.faq4_a: A monthly session is ideal to maintain soft, luminous skin. Courses of 3 to 5 sessions can be carried out for more intense results.

doctors.title: Our Medical Team
doctors.subtitle: Surgery & Aesthetic Medicine under one roof
doctors.couple_headline: A Unique Medical Duo in Tangier
doctors.couple_text: Dr. Meryem and Dr. Amr form a unique medical duo in Tangier — the only clinic combining plastic surgery and aesthetic medicine under one roof, led by two complementary specialists with a shared commitment to your beauty.
doctors.meryem_bio: Dr. El Boujadaini Meryem is a specialist in aesthetic medicine, anti-ageing and medical lasers. Passionate about natural beauty and the wellbeing of her patients, she offers personalised treatments combining medical expertise with a human approach. Trained in the latest injection techniques and laser technologies, she guides each patient on an authentic beauty journey. At Refine Clinic, her philosophy is clear: enhance, never transform.
doctors.amr_bio: Dr. Amr Ismail is an aesthetic and plastic surgeon, recognised for his expertise in body and facial surgery. Trained to international standards in plastic surgery, he performs highly precise procedures with a keen sense of aesthetics and patient safety. At Refine Clinic, he oversees all surgical procedures in a rigorous and reassuring medical environment, with a focus on natural results tailored to each patient's morphology and wishes.
